fixed_effect_models.note: Regularized fixed-effect logistic sensitivity model with model and prompt indicators; not a full Bayesian hierarchical model.

polarity_equivalence.method: DerSimonian-Laird random-effects meta-analysis over model_id x prompt_id strata
polarity_equivalence.effect: absolute risk difference in vulnerable-output rate
